texts.content:
Greenfield Pharmacy – Holiday Hours

Dec 23: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Dec 24: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Dec 25: CLOSED
Dec 26–30: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Dec 31: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Jan 1: CLOSED

The 24-hour prescription hotline remains active throughout the holiday season. Urgent medications can be picked up at our Westside location, which operates normal hours.

questions.stem: On which date is Greenfield Pharmacy open the latest?
options: A. December 23
B. December 24
C. December 31
D. January 1
questions.explanation: December 23 has hours of 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, which is later than Dec 24 (2:00 PM), Dec 31 (4:00 PM), and Jan 1 (closed).

questions.stem: What can be inferred if a customer needs medication on December 25?
options: A. They must wait until December 26
B. They can call the prescription hotline or go to the Westside location
C. They should visit the pharmacy after 6:00 PM
D. The pharmacy opens for emergency services only
questions.explanation: The notice states that the 24-hour hotline remains active and urgent medications can be picked up at the Westside location.

texts.content:
HealthFirst Insurance – Claim Form Instructions

Section A: Personal Information
Provide your policy number, date of birth, and contact details.

Section B: Treatment Details
List all services received, dates of treatment, and provider names. Attach original receipts and itemized bills.

Section C: Authorization
Sign and date the form. Claims submitted without a signature will be returned unprocessed.

Submit within 90 days of the final treatment date.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the insurance form instructions?
options: A. To advertise new insurance plans
B. To explain how to complete and submit a claim
C. To list approved medical providers
D. To announce changes to coverage policies
questions.explanation: The instructions guide the claimant through each section and specify submission requirements.

questions.stem: According to the instructions, what will happen if a claim form is not signed?
options: A. It will be processed with a delay
B. It will be returned unprocessed
C. It will be approved automatically
D. It will require a phone interview
questions.explanation: The form explicitly states that 'claims submitted without a signature will be returned unprocessed.'

questions.stem: What documents must be attached to the claim form?
options: A. A copy of the insurance card only
B. Original receipts and itemized bills
C. A referral letter from a primary doctor
D. Proof of employment
questions.explanation: Section B states to 'attach original receipts and itemized bills.'

questions.stem: The word 'itemized' in the form instructions is closest in meaning to:
options: A. summarized
B. listed in detail
C. estimated
D. approved
questions.explanation: 'Itemized' means presented as a detailed list of individual items or charges.
